headline: 3 Reasons to Avoid UPS and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: United Parcel Service’s 22.5% return over the past six months has outpaced the S&P 500 by 18%, and its stock price has climbed to $106.48 per share. This was partly due to its solid quarterly results, and the performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

raw.headline: 3 Reasons to Avoid UPS and 1 Stock to Buy Instead

headline: UPS, Netflix, BlackRock And A Health Care Stock On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
summary: Stephen Weiss recommends Netflix as final trade, while Jason Snipe likes BlackRock. Amy Raskin suggests Illumina and Jenny Harrington chooses UPS.

raw.headline: UPS, Netflix, BlackRock And A Health Care Stock On CNBC's 'Final Trades'

headline: Tariff Refund Claims Open Monday —Up To $127 Billion Could Flow Back To Importers, But Consumers May Get Nothing
summary: Businesses can claim IEEPA tariff refunds from Monday via CBP's online portal, with filings opening at 8 a.m.
